---
title: ""
pagetitle: "What We Play — The Hamstrings"
title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="content-page">
  <h1 style="text-align:center; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.1em; margin-bottom:1rem;">What We Play</h1>
  <p style="text-align:center; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); margin-bottom:2rem;">
    We cover a little bit of everything. Here are some recent favorites.
  </p>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="repertoire-section">
  <h2>Covers</h2>
  <div class="video-grid">
    <div class="video-card">
      <div style="position:relative;padding-bottom:56.25%;height:0;overflow:hidden;">
        <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/fdBcxEQZb1g"
                style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;border:0;"
                allowfullscreen loading="lazy"></iframe>
      </div>
      <div class="video-info">
        <h4>I've Just Seen a Face</h4>
        <p>The Beatles — Eddie's Attic, March 2025</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="video-card">
      <div style="position:relative;padding-bottom:56.25%;height:0;overflow:hidden;">
        <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/UBMRKyQpqJc"
                style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;border:0;"
                allowfullscreen loading="lazy"></iframe>
      </div>
      <div class="video-info">
        <h4>Oh, Darling</h4>
        <p>The Beatles — Eddie's Attic, March 2025</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="video-card">
      <div style="position:relative;padding-bottom:56.25%;height:0;overflow:hidden;">
        <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/4RNU2FaMAjA"
                style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;border:0;"
                allowfullscreen loading="lazy"></iframe>
      </div>
      <div class="video-info">
        <h4>Cover 3</h4>
        <p>Eddie's Attic, March 2025</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="video-card">
      <div style="position:relative;padding-bottom:56.25%;height:0;overflow:hidden;">
        <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/It7vj9CXPdI"
                style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;border:0;"
                allowfullscreen loading="lazy"></iframe>
      </div>
      <div class="video-info">
        <h4>Cover 4</h4>
        <p>Eddie's Attic, March 2025</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="video-card">
      <div style="position:relative;padding-bottom:56.25%;height:0;overflow:hidden;">
        <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/WtiyyhpgV2Q"
                style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;border:0;"
                allowfullscreen loading="lazy"></iframe>
      </div>
      <div class="video-info">
        <h4>Cover 5</h4>
        <p>Kirkwood Spring Fling, May 2025</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="video-card">
      <div style="position:relative;padding-bottom:56.25%;height:0;overflow:hidden;">
        <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/YEsBUOXVEcA"
                style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;border:0;"
                allowfullscreen loading="lazy"></iframe>
      </div>
      <div class="video-info">
        <h4>Cover 6</h4>
        <p>Kirkwood Spring Fling, May 2025</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="video-card">
      <div style="position:relative;padding-bottom:56.25%;height:0;overflow:hidden;">
        <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/p4pcKQYT8n4"
                style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;border:0;"
                allowfullscreen loading="lazy"></iframe>
      </div>
      <div class="video-info">
        <h4>Cover 7</h4>
        <p>Kirkwood Spring Fling, May 2025</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="video-card">
      <div style="position:relative;padding-bottom:56.25%;height:0;overflow:hidden;">
        <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/u_Cuspc_XeA"
                style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;border:0;"
                allowfullscreen loading="lazy"></iframe>
      </div>
      <div class="video-info">
        <h4>Cover 8</h4>
        <p>Mellow Mushroom, July 2024</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="video-card">
      <div style="position:relative;padding-bottom:56.25%;height:0;overflow:hidden;">
        <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/N_b5nrhzTfM"
                style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;border:0;"
                allowfullscreen loading="lazy"></iframe>
      </div>
      <div class="video-info">
        <h4>Cover 9</h4>
        <p>Inman Park Wine Stroll, 2023</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="booking-section">
  <h2>Want to hear more?</h2>
  <p>Check out our <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@thehamstringsatl" style="color:#fff; text-decoration:underline;">YouTube channel</a> or come see us live!</p>
  <a href="shows.html" class="hero-cta">View Shows</a>
</div>
```
